name: Betrayal at House on the Hill
description: Betrayal at House on the Hill is the cult-favorite haunted-mansion exploration game — for the first half of the game, players cooperate to map a procedurally tiled house, gathering items and omens. Then "the Haunt" triggers: one of fifty scenarios flips the table into a one-vs-many horror climax, and an explorer is revealed as the traitor. Different every game, gloriously chaotic.
